testcase.name: getProductTechnicalInfo

error.message: Expected condition failed: waiting for visibility of all elements located by By.xpath: //span[text()='Technical Information']/../../following-sibling::div//span[contains(@class,'info-text')] (tried for 300 second(s) with 500 milliseconds interval) Build info: version: '4.5.3', revision: '4b786a1e430' System info: os.name: 'Mac OS X', os.arch: 'aarch64', os.version: '13.0.1', java.version: '17.0.4.1' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 107.0.5304.110, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 107.0.5304.62 (1eec40d3a576..., userDataDir: /var/folders/2r/pxfps75s1kg...}, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:62227}, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: MAC, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:62227/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 107.0.5304.110, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 605d2b0b46ce0ad3c497c1c0f979897b
